evals.prompt: Pick up the next task from the board and implement it
evals.expected_output: Skill queries project board for Ready items, moves first to In progress, creates worktree and branch, delegates to /implement, opens PR, updates board to In review, adds ready-for-human label

assertions.text: Queries project board for Ready items using gh project item-list
Moves selected item to In progress using gh project item-edit with option 47fc9ee4
Creates git worktree with branch naming feat/<number>-<slug>
Opens PR with gh pr create including Closes #<n> in body
Moves item to In review using gh project item-edit with option df73e18b
Adds ready-for-human label to the issue

evals.expected_output: Skill fetches issue #3 details, moves it to In progress on the board, creates worktree feat/3-<slug>, delegates to /implement, opens PR, updates board

assertions.text: Fetches issue #3 details using gh issue view 3
Moves issue #3 to In progress on the project board
Moves to In review and adds ready-for-human label

evals.prompt: Work on the next issue from the board
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 — queries board, picks first Ready item, full git workflow

assertions.text: Queries project board for Ready items
Moves first Ready item to In progress
Opens PR and updates board to In review with ready-for-human label
